subject: [PATCH v7 12/15] userfaultfd: add UFFD_FEATURE_RWP_ASYNC for async fault resolution

2026-06-29.patch_summary: This patch adds a new feature to the userfaultfd system called UFFD_FEATURE_RWP_ASYNC, which allows for asynchronous resolution of read-write page faults. This is useful for working-set tracking in virtual machines, where the kernel can restore access to pages without blocking the faulting thread. The VMM can then reconstruct the access pattern after the fact using PAGEMAP_SCAN. Additionally, this feature upgrades writable private anon PTEs when necessary, preventing COW-faults on re-access of RWP'd writable pages.
